input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.14.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.14.3
            TITLE: repairs or changes after inspection approval

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.14.3: Repairs or Changes After Inspection Approval
IN.14.3 Repairs or Changes After Inspection Approval 
The Inspection Approval may be voided for any reason including, but not limited to: 
a. Damage to the vehicle  IN.13.1.3 
b. Changes beyond those allowed per IN.14.2 above

final_answer: rule IN.14.3: Repairs or Changes After Inspection Approval IN.14.3 Repairs or Changes After Inspection Approval The Inspection Approval may be voided for any reason including, but not limited to: a. Damage to the vehicle IN.13.1.3 b. Changes beyond those allowed per IN.14.2 above
